SEARCH
Package simulator.core

Class SimulationEngine

java.lang.Object
simulator.core.SimulationEngine
public class SimulationEngine extends Object
The main engine of the simulation (The Clock). Controls the passage of time (ticks) and orchestrates interactions between the scheduler, virtual memory, processors, and the system process. Implements an Observer pattern (via SimulationEventListener) to decouple internal logic from display systems (text file, graphical interface).

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationEngine

      public SimulationEngine(SimulationConfig config, UserProcess[] processes)
      Constructs and initializes the simulation engine.
      Parameters:
      config - System parameter configuration.
      processes - Array of processes read and ready for launch.

  • Method Details

    • addEventListener

      public void addEventListener(SimulationEventListener listener)
      Registers a new listener for events generated by the simulator.
      Parameters:
      listener - Object implementing the SimulationEventListener interface.

    • run

      public void run()
      Starting point of the simulation. Runs a continuous time loop until all user processes reach the TERMINATED state. Includes a safety timeout at T=20000 to prevent infinite loops.

    • logEvent

      public void logEvent(int time, String category, String message)
      Centralized method for logging.
